title: nephrodium molle var. aureum
intro: Nephrodium molle var. aureum, also known as the golden maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Nephrodium molle var. aureum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory problems.
